metadata.title:
JURY FAIL


TO AGREE

IMPOSSIBLE TO REACH YER.
DICT IN 100000 DAMAGE


SUIT.

pages.raw_text:
After being out II hours the jury
in the 100000 damage suit Of Au-
gusta Steffans and children
against the Northern Pacific Rail-
road Co. for the death Of their hus-
band and father, failed to agree,
and filed into Judge Huneks's
court room this morning declaring
that it was impossible for them to
return a verdict.


From the very first nine of the
jurors stood in favor of the plain
tiff, while three held out until the
last for the railroad company. 1t
is reported that one of the three
jurors has a son working for the
Northern Pacific and that another
is related to a high official Of the
company. Several of the jurymen
declared that the trio refused to en-
ter into a discussion of the evil
dence and stood firmly for the de-
fense from the very beginning.


Michael Steffans was killed in
jumping from a passenger train
as he thought that the train was
running away. Although trainmen
who jumped at the same time he
did testified at first that they
thought the train was beyond the
control of the engineer, they stated
on the stand during the course of
the trial that they jumped off to
help Steffans.
